concerns.detail: Deletion of large block of substantive criticism regarding advisor Shuangping HUANG, including specific advising practices (project obsession, graduation delay threats, first-authorship theft, refusal to take responsibility for errors) mixed with insults; appears to suppress legitimate observations rather than mere cleanup
concerns.excerpt: 项目狂魔（项目>杂活>>科研>>实习），延毕警告（敢考公实习，不想毕业了吗），不粘锅（自己瞎指挥或者难题丢给学生后出问题，学生背锅）...喜欢抢一作(最近一次是2024年，芳龄52的时候)

concerns.detail: Inserted text contains unsupported character attacks and mocking tone questioning the subject's morality and conscience rather than describing concrete advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 你自己良心过得去吗？那么多intern那么多家庭花了这么多钱哈哈哈哈哈哈还真是

concerns.detail: Disclosure of specific email address (api@somastacks.com) that could identify private individuals or de-anonymize students associated with the account
